claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: most of the production traffic now goes through the per-location model because that is what most brazilian merchants expect

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: três modelos sim. the per-location one, the per-cnpj one which is sort of legal entity but not exactly because cnpj has its own complications in brazil, and the hybrid we built
claims.object_value: three models: per-location, per-cnpj (legal entity), and hybrid

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: week two of implementation. we should have caught it in design but we didn't

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: it is better than it was. six months ago it was bad. now we have a daily sync sara runs, thirty minutes, agenda
claims.object_value: daily sync, 30 minutes, with agenda, run by Sara

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: the same as singapore. linear, github, datadog

claims.subject: Brazil merchant onboarding portal
claims.evidence: we also have an internal portal we built before helixpay acquired us for merchant onboarding here in brazil — that is going away as part of confluence
claims.object_value: as part of Project Confluence (date unspecified)

claims.subject: Project Confluence
claims.evidence: that is going away as part of confluence which honestly i am sad about because it works well for the brazilian context but i understand why we need to retire it

claims.subject: Camila Souza
claims.evidence: in my head mostly. some in pedro. luiz knows the high level... when i leave this company someday all of this leaves with me and pedro
claims.object_value: critical Brazil institutional knowledge concentrated in Camila Souza and Pedro; not systematically documented

claims.subject: Brazil merchant chain with thirty stores
claims.evidence: a chain with thirty stores has thirty different banking setups in some cases and we have to pick one. or build rules that pick the right one per transaction which is what we are doing for some merchants.
claims.object_value: up to thirty different banking setups per chain; rules built to pick correct setup per transaction for some merchants

claims.subject: Project Confluence schema design
claims.evidence: the unified schema with one merchant_id per legal entity that is the singapore convention and it makes sense for sea, mas a gente sabe que for brazil you are throwing away a lot of context.
claims.object_value: unified schema uses one merchant_id per legal entity (Singapore convention), which discards Brazil-specific context

claims.subject: Brazil schema design review
claims.evidence: the design review happened in singapore and the brazil context was not in the room enough. tipo, i was in the meeting but a one hour meeting is not enough to communicate eight years of history in two acquired companies plus our own.
claims.object_value: design review held in Singapore; one-hour meeting insufficient to convey eight years of history across two acquired companies

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: there are some old documents in portuguese from before the helixpay acquisition that nobody on the singapore side has read because they are in portuguese and not translated.
claims.object_value: pre-acquisition documents in Portuguese, untranslated, unread by Singapore team

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: by the time i see something sara wrote in slack it is already her next morning so a question and an answer takes a full day round trip.
claims.object_value: one full day round trip for a question and answer via Slack due to time zone difference

claims.subject: HelixPay Brasil
claims.evidence: it is better than it was. six months ago it was bad. now we have a daily sync sara runs, thirty minutes, agenda.
claims.object_value: communication improved from six months ago when it was poor

claims.subject: Brazil internal merchant onboarding portal
claims.evidence: honestly i am sad about because it works well for the brazilian context but i understand why we need to retire it.
claims.object_value: works well for the Brazilian context; being retired despite this

claims.evidence: we also have an internal portal we built before helixpay acquired us for merchant onboarding here in brazil

claims.evidence: he protects the team from a lot of the noise.
